tasks.subject: Phase 55: Portfolio Rebalancer
tasks.description:
Port pt_rebalancer.py to Go. Create internal/trading/rebalancer package with:
- Rebalancer with target allocation percentages
- drift detection (current vs target weights)
- rebalance order generation (sells overweight, buys underweight)
- configurable drift threshold
- periodic rebalance scheduling

tasks.subject: Phase 56: Feature Engine for Analytics/ML
tasks.description:
Port pt_feature_engine.py to Go. Create internal/analytics/features package with:
- FeatureExtractor interface
- Price-based features (returns, volatility, momentum)
- Volume-based features (volume ratio, OBV trend)
- Technical indicator features (RSI level, MACD signal, BB position)
- Feature matrix generation for ML/research use

tasks.subject: Phase 57: Multi-Exchange Price Aggregation
tasks.description:
Port pt_multi_exchange.py and pt_exchanges.py aggregation to Go. Create internal/exchange/aggregator package with:
- Multi-exchange price aggregation (median, VWAP, best bid/ask)
- Arbitrage opportunity detection (spread monitoring)
- Exchange failover and health tracking
- Unified market data across multiple exchanges

tasks.subject: Phase 58: Advanced Drawdown Analytics
tasks.description:
Port advanced analytics from pt_advanced_analytics.py. Create internal/analytics/drawdown package with:
- Rolling max drawdown calculation
- Drawdown duration tracking
- Recovery time analysis
- Underwater curve generation
- Calmar ratio (return / max drawdown)

tasks.subject: Phase 59: Backtest Reporting Engine
tasks.description:
Create internal/backtest/reporting package with:
- Full backtest report generation
- Equity curve output
- Trade log with entry/exit/PnL
- Performance summary (Sharpe, Sortino, max DD, win rate, profit factor)
- Monthly returns breakdown
- HTML/JSON report output
